description_long: This hardware store is a rectangular, multi-story commercial building with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The facade features large, horizontally aligned windows with yellow-tinted panes, framed by gray borders, and a blue accent strip along the base. The front of the building has three wide entryways, likely for customer access and deliveries, and a prominent blue rectangular sign mounted above the entrance. The rooftop includes several boxy structures, possibly HVAC units or skylights, and a large billboard sign. The exterior is primarily finished in shades of gray, blue, and yellow, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The overall structure suggests a focus on functionality and accessibility, typical of urban hardware stores.
description: A modern, rectangular hardware store with large yellow windows, blue accents, and a prominent blue sign above three wide entrances. The building features a flat roof with rooftop equipment and a billboard.
description_view_0: The side view shows two rows of yellow windows and a blue base, with rooftop equipment visible but no entrances.
description_view_1: This view highlights the long side of the building, displaying the full row of windows, rooftop units, and the large blue sign.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals a smaller window arrangement and the side of the rooftop sign, with minimal architectural features.
description_view_3: The front view features three wide entrances, a row of large yellow windows, and a prominent blue sign above the entryways.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large, plain blue rectangular sign is mounted above the main entrances, with no visible text or logos.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features three wide entrances at the base, a row of large yellow windows above, and a prominent blue sign above the entryways. The facade is simple and symmetrical, with no visible display areas or decorative elements.
